name: Little Falls Sports & Recreation Complex
description: Little Falls Sports & Recreation Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Little Falls, NJ. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are private. Players have access to lights.

name: Maple Valley Park
description: Come play pickleball at Maple Valley Park in Clifton, NJ! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Packanack Lake & Tennis Club
description: Come play pickleball at Packanack Lake & Tennis Club in Wayne, NJ! There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Passaic Park Howard Ave Courts
description: Passaic Park Howard Ave Courts is a place to play pickleball in Passaic, NJ. There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Pines Lake
description: Pines Lake is a place to play pickleball in Wayne, NJ. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Sky Pickleball Bubble
description: Sky Pickleball Bubble is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wayne, NJ. There are 8 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved.

name: Sportime Pickleball - Wayne
description: Sportime Pickleball - Wayne is a place to play pickleball in Wayne, NJ. There are 18 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available. Amenities include food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Wayne YMCA
description: Wayne YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Wayne, NJ. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available.

name: Westbrook Courts
description: Westbrook Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in West Milford, NJ. There are 10 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: West Milford Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at West Milford Recreation Center in West Milford, NJ! There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like water, lights, and trainers or lessons. You can’t reserve the courts. A membership is required to play.
